scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently -n server,blockly -c green,yellow "cd server && npm start" "cd $(grep KINDER_BLOCKLY_PATH server/.env | cut -d= -f2) && python -m kinder_blockly"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && cd server && npm start
scripts.heroku-postbuild: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
